title: BEM-827 delete bad queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:26 (UTC+3)'
queue_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
invalid=[]
valid=[]
for p in sorted(queue_dir.glob('*.json')):
    try:
        data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
        if not (data.get('workflow') or data.get('workflow_id') or data.get('file')):
            invalid.append({'path':str(p),'reason':'missing workflow key'})
        else:
            valid.append(str(p))
    except Exception as exc:
        invalid.append({'path':str(p),'reason':str(exc)})
for item in invalid:
    p=Path(item['path'])
    if p.exists():
        p.unlink()
# Replace the whole queue state with one clean item for Claude dispatcher.
for p in sorted(queue_dir.glob('*.json')):
    # keep valid existing items only if they are not old BEM775/BEM779/BEM822 retries
    if any(x in p.name for x in ['bem775','bem779','bem822']):
        p.unlink()
clean=queue_dir/'bem827_clean_claude_dispatch.json'
clean.write_text(json.dumps({
    'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v4',
    'workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml',
    'workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml',
    'ref':'main',
    'inputs':{},
    'reason':'BEM-827 clean dispatch after deleting invalid queue JSON files',
    'created_at':created
}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+sep, encoding='utf-8')
state={'bem':'BEM-827','status':'bad_queue_jsons_deleted_clean_queue_created','invalid_deleted':invalid,'clean_queue_file':str(clean),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem827_delete_bad_queue_jsons.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem827_delete_bad_queue_jsons.md').write_text('# BEM-827 | Delete Bad Queue JSONs | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results, Claude runtime, real Claude response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-827'+sep+sep+'Deleted invalid queue JSONs and created one clean Claude dispatch queue item. Next: tick and verify single smoke proof.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem827_clean_claude_dispatch.json','governance/state/bem827_delete_bad_queue_jsons.json','governance/reports/bem827_delete_bad_queue_jsons.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
for item in invalid:
    changed_files.append(item['path'])
ops_applied.append('Deleted invalid workflow dispatch queue JSON files instead of patching them and created one clean Claude dispatcher queue item')
"""
